author: EventideMiles
description: A feedback-first, novelist-focused writing assistant. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: Eventide Quill

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* 1.2.1 patch: editor crash on enable/disable + co-writer/linter dogfood fixes by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/41
* fix(change-diff): complete enable/disable field-absence hardening (follow-up to #41) by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/42


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Native Anthropic Claude + Google Gemini providers by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/39
* Release tagger script (npm run release) by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/40


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Mobile UX fixes — responsive breakpoints, queue feedback, streaming watchdog, icon fallbacks, editorial chunking by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/38


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/compare/1.0.1...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Lorebook Foundation (v0.7.0) by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/19
* Co-writer tools + Lorebook Coach (v0.8.0) by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/20
* Network tools + @ file mentions + MediaWiki compliance by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/21
* Add image and vision support by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/22
* subagent batches + tool-augmented analysis + DRY consolidation by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/23
* co-writer image paste + responsive collapse + subagent clearing by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/24
* lore entry images — scanner + get_lore_image + wikipedia_image + agent-attach by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/25
* gallery multi-image fix, slash commands, diff rendering + edit matching fixes by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/26
* co-writer inline cards + saved conversations + rewind + @-mention fixes by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/27
* local Fandom cache + jscpd gate + sponsor links by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/28
* complete the local Fandom cache by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/29
* three manuscript-analysis modes (subplot / theme / genre) by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/30
* async feedback queue by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/31
* lorebook relationship mapping by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/32
* 1.0.0 polish bundle by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/33
* 1.0.0 release: version bump, release CI hardening, Obsidian compliance, and vitest test suite by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/34
* 1.0.0 Obsidian review compliance by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/35
* chore: bump version to 1.0.1 by @EventideMiles in https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/pull/36


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/EventideMiles/eventide-quill/commits/1.0.1
